sources.name: Clipping.com
sources.notes: Primary clipping marketplace. Wide category coverage.

sources.name: MuslimsClipping.com
sources.notes: Primary for Islamic/faith niche accounts. Verified by Moe.

sources.name: StreamClip
sources.notes: Open-source clip extractor. Review terms before use at scale.

sources.name: Opus Clip
sources.notes: AI-powered clip extraction from long-form videos. Automatically finds viral moments. Free tier: 60 min/month. Best for converting Moe's own long-form to shorts.

sources.name: Vidyo.ai
sources.notes: AI video repurposing — clips + captions + resize for all platforms in one step. Free tier available.

sources.name: 2short.ai
sources.notes: YouTube-native AI clipper. Paste any YouTube URL → AI finds best moments → exports as Shorts/Reels.

sources.name: Clip.fm
sources.notes: Podcast-to-clip AI. Best for extracting motivational/interview moments.

sources.name: yt-dlp
sources.notes: Already installed in JARVIS OPS (v2026.06.09). Downloads from 1000+ sites. Use for batch downloading source clips. Usage: yt-dlp <url> -o '%(title)s.%(ext)s'

sources.name: Islamic Finder Videos
sources.notes: Islamic content source. Verify copyright/reuse terms per video before clipping.

sources.name: Archive.org
sources.notes: Internet Archive — all content is public domain or Creative Commons. Zero copyright risk. Massive library of speeches, lectures, historical footage.

sources.name: Pexels / Pixabay Videos
sources.notes: Royalty-free b-roll for overlays and background. Use to enhance clips visually. No copyright issues.

sources.name: Descript
sources.notes: AI video editor. Auto-captions, filler-word removal, speaker detection. Strong for polishing clips before posting.

workflow.step1_source: Get clip URL from clipping.com, muslimsclipping.com, or archive.org
workflow.step2_download: Run yt-dlp <url> or use AI clipper (Opus Clip / 2short.ai)
workflow.step3_process: Run scripts/clip-processor.py — trim, add captions, resize for each platform
workflow.step4_schedule: Upload per posting-schedule.json for US peak windows
workflow.step5_engage: Add ManyChat keyword trigger within 30 min of posting on Instagram

copyright_rules.fair_use_note: Short clips (under 30s) of public speeches may qualify as fair use commentary. Always add value — captions, context, commentary.
